case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS FLEET, BLYTHE.

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $341.04 AS TO DEFENDANT FLEET, BLYTHE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLEET, BLYTHE. $276.70 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $331.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FLEET, BLYTHE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $276.70 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT FLEET, BLYTHE. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLEET, BLYTHE.
